_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: The 'MET-addicted' NF1-MET tumor model is highly responsive to MET inhibition
details: Highly responsive to MET inhibition, described as MET-addicted tumor model
